name: Soupa Me Lahano (Cabbage Soup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Select the white leaves from the cabbage and shred them finer than for salad.
2. Cover with water (which is not part of the 12 cups required) and bring to a boil. Boil for 5 minutes, then drain.
3. In a skillet, brown the butter.
4. Add the onions and sauté until they are a light golden color.
5. Transfer the onions to a large pot with the remaining 12 cups of water. Bring to a boil.
6. Add the dill, frankfurters, and cabbage. Season to taste.
7. Cook for about 1 hour, or until the onions and cabbage are very soft.
8. Serve hot with croutons. The soup will reduce in volume to serve 6 to 8 people.
